title: Cobblemon Unleashed
description: Cobblemon is an excellent Mod. Fabric is a nice loader. Cobblemon has a number of addons....So....let's unleash Cobblemon. This pack contains a number of the Cobblemon Mod Addons and combines it with Create. Go have some fun!
body: This modpack combines the base of Fabulously Optimized. I then saw how outstanding Cobblemon was. Then further saw just how active Cobblemon Development is along with the various Addons mods for it. So after doing some more research we now have Cobblemon Unleashed. A Cobblemon Modpack with a number of Addons and a splash of Create and some RPG elements to give you an hopefully enjoyable time. Go out, catch them all, explore, dungeon dive and have fun!
